name: Stuffed Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 can canned tomatoes, chopped or ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove twelve large leaves from cabbage. Blanch one minute and drain.
2. Mix ground beef, sausage, rice, salt, pepper, thyme, and allspice.
3. Divide the mixture into twelve parts and shape each into a log two inches shorter than a cabbage leaf.
4. Place one meat log lengthwise on each cabbage leaf.
5. Fold one side over the meat, then fold the ends over, and finally fold the remaining side.
6. Place the cabbage rolls seam-side down in a single layer in a large, shallow baking dish.
7. Mix onions with sauerkraut and spread over the cabbage rolls.
8. Pour tomatoes over all.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, until meat is cooked through.
